notes: US-based specialist in specialty wax powders for cosmetics. Micro Powders' Mattewax® 511 is a benchmark product for elegant matte finishes in color cosmetics, creams, and lotions. Their PTFE-free alternatives address clean beauty requirements. Particularly valuable for matte skincare, color cosmetics, and any formulation requiring soft-focus or line-filling effects.
